tcaptionWithComment.description: Inserts a Caption property, with the comment section (AL Tools).

tToolTipWithComment.description: Inserts a ToolTip property, with the comment section (AL Tools).

tLabelWithComment.description: Inserts a Label variable declaration with the comment section (AL Tools). Format: VarName: Label 'Text', Comment = '...';

tCommentWithLanguage.description: Inserts the comment section property for translations (AL Tools).
